notableEvents.label: Matt McLain GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain grounds into a double play, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Dane Myers out at 2nd. Matt McLain out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart steals (7) 3rd base. Spencer Steer steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Javier Báez. Elly De La Cruz scores. Nathaniel Lowe to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Javier Báez. Elly De La Cruz scores. Nathaniel Lowe to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Spencer Steer scores.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, pitcher Kyle Nicolas to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a ground ball to right fielder Rece Hinds. Riley Greene to 3rd. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter lines into an unassisted double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz. Colt Keith out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Javier Báez. Elly De La Cruz scores. Nathaniel Lowe to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Javier Báez. Elly De La Cruz scores. Nathaniel Lowe to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith singles on a line drive to right fielder Rece Hinds.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Colt Keith scores.

notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Spencer Steer scores.
